properties.How to Conserve (Soil Conservation, Plan: Clearing of Lake, Water Pollution Prevention and Inland fish farming
properties.Observation: Earthen Bund Length =100.0m, Bund height = 5.0m, Bund Top width = 3.0m, 1.5m long CO Spill + 0.6m high plank,  Head wall Sluice Diameter =300mm, The existing sluice is in dilapidated condition. The lake is located on land belonging to the Forest Conservation Department. The lake is full of silt.
properties.Field Manager's Recommendation: Rehabilitation of tank bund, Reconstruction of head wall type new sluice. Desilting of tank bed and Inland fish farming, Planting 50m width tree belt in US reservation of the tank.
